plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: GigShield uses your location to verify you are inside your insured delivery zone when testing parametric triggers.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: GigShield uses your location to show your position on the coverage map and to validate zone-based triggers.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: GigShield uses your location to validate insured delivery zones and show coverage on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: GigShield uses your location to validate insured delivery zones when processing triggers.
